name: rust-lang crates.io — Deploy broke download URL generation (3.7M failed requests)
problem_title: All crate downloads failing — 404 on static.crates.io after infrastructure deploy

expected.notes: Deployment bug in download URL generation. 3.7M failed requests in 13 minutes. Rollback fixed it.

mock_problem.title: All crate downloads failing — 404 on static.crates.io after infrastructure deploy

evidence.details: Download error rate: 0% → 100% within 1 minute of deploy
URL generation: invalid path prefix in download URL — static.crates.io returning 404

entries.message: crates.io infra deploy v2023.07.20 — DNS record recreation + certificate rotation
URL generation: path prefix mismatch — generated '/crates/' expected '/crates-io-cdn/'
CDN origin: all asset requests returning 404 — path not found after DNS record recreation
cargo client retrying: 4 attempts, all 404 — crate download completely broken
estimated 890K failed download requests in last 3 minutes at 4,710 req/s
ALL crate downloads broken — Rust ecosystem build pipelines failing globally

deployments.commit_message: infra: recreate DNS records and TLS certificates for static.crates.io — CDN migration
